background.description: Warm stone / light canvas, used for primary background.

sidebar.description: Slightly darker warm stone, used for side panels and input areas.

text.description: Deep matte charcoal for high legibility.
Soft slate gray for labels, helpers, and secondary metadata.

accent.description: Refined terracotta / rust, used for targets, active states, and buttons.
Darker terracotta shade for hover states.

status.description: Deep sage green for successful localizations or verified states.
Ochre yellow for warnings and ambiguity indicators.

borders.description: Light earthy lines to delineate panels and inputs.

grids.description: Used for background grid meshes and surveyors indicators.
